summary: Consumed the Aitri v2.0.0-rc.161 status --json additions the Hub filed as HUB-CATCHUP-0705. lastSession now sources from the snapshot payload when the key is present (key-presence = contract proof, TRD ADR-1), confining the .aitri.local inline read — the acknowledged SCHEMA.md deviation — to pre-rc.161 CLIs only. New projectQualitySurfaces carries per-pipeline quality_gates (narrowed projection) and ac_coverage (unchanged pass-through) into the record as the additive qualitySurfaces key, omitted when empty so pre-rc.161 records stay byte-identical (golden-record pin with mutation guard). Closes the FR-047 technical_debt of contract-catchup-rc159 with 24 running tests (zero skips — the placeholder pattern did not recur). Ship-time data edit: integration-compat.json reviewedUpTo advances to 2.0.0-rc.161 after the rc.160/rc.161 '— additive' CHANGELOG review.

requirement_compliance.evidence: lib/collector/index.js snapshotSpeaksLastSession gate; TC-060h/e/f (poison .aitri.local technique proves no file read)
TC-063h/e/f vs evaluateIntegrationAlert; live manifest edit at ship time
TC-057h/e/f legacy-path pins; aitri-reader.js untouched in the diff

diff strictly removes a file read for rc.161+ projects; no new fs paths
